name: Feature request

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other projects, etc.

## Would you like to contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself
- [ ] No, just a suggestion

If yes, please indicate your experience level with Java/Spring and any relevant background.
